summary: Set 064 Session 4 of 4 (FINAL): D7 consumer propagation + D8 docs + dual release. D7 — the consumer-bootstrap template bundle now ships three metadata-aware guidance starters (lessons-learned / project-guidance / lessons-archive), rendered into docs/planning/ by BOTH renderConsumerBootstrap (7->10 artifacts) and renderStructureBootstrap (5->8); esbuild required array + README + golden fixtures (test-fixtures/cold-start/{full,lightweight}) regenerated via UPDATE_GOLDEN=1; count assertions updated across consumerBootstrap.test.ts, gettingStartedActions.test.ts, gitScaffoldCore.test.ts; vsce ls confirms all 10 templates package into the .vsix; the Python cold-start acceptance test still boots from the new golden tree. D7 — docs/cross-repo-guidance-lifecycle-notice.md points the over-budget consumers (dabbler-access-harvester ~3.9x, dabbler-platform) at the D6 backlog recipe (routed gemini-pro authoring). D8 — NEW canonical engine-agnostic docs/guidance-lifecycle.md (routed gemini-pro doc, 3 verifier-flagged Minor gaps enriched); docs sweep made CLAUDE/AGENTS/GEMINI + ai-led-session-workflow.md + quick-start.md + lessons-learned.md + project-guidance.md all point at the canonical lifecycle doc (no sole-sourced fact). Release: ai_router 0.18.0->0.19.0 (pyproject + __init__ + CHANGELOG 0.19.0 covering D1-D6) and extension 0.32.0->0.33.0 (package.json + lock + CHANGELOG 0.33.0 carrying Set 063 + Set 064 D7, since 0.32.0 was bumped but never tag-pushed); repository-reference.md release table + version walk in pre-push wording. Both publishes deliberately PENDING the operator's v0.19.0 / vsix-v0.33.0 tag pushes through the green-Test gate. SUITES: Python 1300 passed / 1 skipped / 0 failed; TS unit 908 passing (2 failing = the long-standing tracked Set-026 baseline configEditor-foundation + notificationsSection); drift_guard.py clean; guidance headers re-stamped under ceiling. VERIFICATION: gpt-5-4 cross-provider (cross-provider for the Claude orchestrator), 3 rounds. R1 ISSUES_FOUND (2 Major: guidance_report --write-headers documentation gap + project-guidance.md.template pointed at a non-scaffolded session-set-authoring-guide.md; 1 Minor: disuse vs rare-but-critical wording) all fixed -> R2 confirmed 1+2 + flagged residual wording -> harmonized both bullets -> R3 VERIFIED. Structured findings + dispositions in s4-issues.json. Routed spend this session ~$0.65 (lifecycle doc $0.0228 + notice $0.0082 + assignment $0.0036 + R1 $0.2226 + R2 $0.0559 + R3 ~$0.02 + guidance_report calls $0). No tag push this session (operator-authorized release).
